memoryArtifacts.headline: Burghley monument  Stamford, Lincolnshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Burghley monument

Stamford, Lincolnshire, England

On the east wall of the Burghley Chapel is this monument to Richard Cecill who died in 1552 and his wife Jayne who died in 1587. She is shown opposite to him kneeling at a prayer desk. Richard is buried in a vault in St Margaret's Church in Westminster.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Heckington於1501年出生在英國林可爾史爾包恩時，她的父親William Heckington II32歲，母親Lady Alice Ann Walcott29歲。她於1519年與Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾包恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年3月10日在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Heckington于1501年出生在英国林可爾史爾包恩时，她的父亲William Heckington II32岁，母亲Lady Alice Ann Walcott29岁。她于1519年与Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l在英国英格兰林可爾史爾包恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年3月10日在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Heckington

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Heckington was born in 1501, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Heckington II, was 32 and her mother, Lady Alice Ann Walcott, was 29. She married Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l in 1519, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 10 March 1587, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Heckington est née en 1501, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Heckington II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Ann Walcott, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l en 1519, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1587, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Heckington 1501 in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Heckington II 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Ann Walcott 29. Sie hat 1519 in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1587 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Heckington è nata il nel 1501 nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William Heckington II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Ann Walcott, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l nel 1519, nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1587, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Heckingtonが1501年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父William Heckington IIは32歳，母Lady Alice Ann Walcottは29歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンでSir Nicholas Richard Cecil lと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1587年3月10日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Heckington(이)가 1501년 영국 링코실르 본에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Heckington II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Ann Walcott(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 본에서 Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 3월 10일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Heckington nasceu em 1501, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heckington II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Ann Walcott, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l em 1519, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1587, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Heckington родилась в 1501 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Heckington II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Ann Walcott, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l в 1519 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 марта 1587 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Heckington nació en 1501, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Heckington II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Ann Walcott, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Richard Cecil l en 1519, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1587, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
